title: Wild Life
titleNative: ワイルドライフ
synopsis: Tesshō is a high school juvenile delinquent. He has a special ability of perfect pitch. He saves a wild dog with the help of Kashu, a veterinarian. He later names the wild dog inu (Japanese for "dog"). He then finds his purpose in life: to become a veterinarian.

title: A Ninja and an Assassin Under One Roof
titleEnglish: A Ninja and an Assassin Under One Roof
titleNative: 忍者と殺し屋のふたりぐらし
synopsis: After a series of unfortunate events, young ninja Satoko has found herself sharing a house with the deadly assassin, Konoha. On the run from her village due to a misunderstanding, she’s relying on Konoha’s murderous skills to keep her safe from the ninjas seeking to kill her. But Konoha isn’t the easiest to get along with and is only tolerating Satoko due to her excellent skills at cleaning up messes—both from Konoha’s work and in her home. Somehow, these two will find harmony in their new life together while keeping ninja attackers at bay! So long as they can survive each other, that is. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: 1000 Yen Hero
titleNative: 1000円ヒーロ
synopsis: “I won't become a hero even if I am poor, because as long as Honoka continues to smile, it's all worth it.” Monsters are on the loose! But luckily for the people of Japan, heroes are there to protect them, with powers that run on a rate of yen per second. For Hiasa Sen, however, there are many more important things to worry about, like catching sales on groceries, and his many part-time jobs, all to take care of his little sister. When danger approaches, however, he has a secret power of his own, but it may be more trouble than it's worth. (Source: Comikey)

title: Shinozaki-kun no Mente Jijou
titleNative: 篠崎くんのメンテ事情
synopsis: Shinozaki – an utterly ordinary salaryman who has been suffering from a "pain in the neck" – finds his otherwise-typical life suddenly interrupted by a young woman named Yuuyake. According to Yuuyake, her magician grandmother had modified Shinozaki’s body to an extreme degree such that he’s chock-full of machinery inside! …All of which require regular maintenance that Yuuyake will apparently be performing from now on. With that, the slightly offbeat daily life begins, between Shinozaki the salaryman, Yuuyake the magician, and a mysterious creature named Grey! (Source: Pixiv Comics, translated) Note: Chapter count includes 43 main chapters, one epilogue, and 14 other extra and bonus chapters.

title: Bocchi the Rock! Comic Anthology
titleNative: ぼっち・ざ・ろっく！アンソロジーコミック
synopsis: Hitori “Bocchi” Gotoh might find it hard to make friends, but that doesn't mean she's lacking in admirers! This rockin' anthology features a lineup of all-star guest authors ready to take the stage for the ultimate Bocchi the Rock! tribute concert! With a set list featuring hits such as “What If Bocchi Was Totally Ripped?,” “Kessoku Band Tours in Another World,” and “Hitori Gotoh vs the Police,” you'll discover new sides to your favorite characters you never even dreamed of! (Source: Yen Press) Volume 1 (2022/10/27) #Cover illustration: Chiba Sadoru #Illustrations: Matsuda Hikari, Uzaki Uso, Instant, Hoshi, Souma Hajime, HOJI, Iwawa 1. Bocchi the Rock!? (ぼっち・ざ・錠〈ロック〉!?) [Yuichi (ゆいち)] 2. Futari-chan no Okaimono Daisakusen! (ふたりちゃんのお買い物大作戦!) [Takeo Kyuujuu (タケオキュージュウ)] 3. Arigatou Guitar to Kinniku (ありがとうギターと筋肉) [Shirou Urayama] 4. Bocchi-chan no Otoshimono (ぼっちちゃんの落とし物) [Totsuno Takahide] 5. Bocchi-chan vs. Shokushitsu (ぼっちちゃん VS 職質) [Uraya Nagi] 6. Bocchi the Rally! (ぼっち・ざ・らりー!) [Uchino Maiko] 7. Toaru Classmate ga Mita Kessoku Band (とあるクラスメイトが見た結束バンド) [Cornflake (コーンフレーcu)] 8. Kessoku Band to Fushigi na Ehon (結束バンドと不思議な絵本) [Fuku Kitsune] 9. Go to the Burger Shop (GO TO BURGER SHO

title: Nihonkoku Shoukan
titleNative: 日本国召喚
synopsis: Japan one day suddenly materialises in another world. The Japanese government is put into chaos amid food shortages and many other issues. The JSDF is dispatched to survey the area and find out as much information as possible, the JSDF discover dragons during their search and men riding dragons. From this the Government confirms their beliefs the entire nation had been transported to another world. Negotiations between the government and their new neighbours swiftly begin in hopes of solving the food problem as quickly as possible. How were they transported here, why were they transported and what awaits the nation in this other world?

title: Doom: Satsujin Keisatsukan no Danzairoku
titleNative: ドゥーム 殺人警察官の断罪録
synopsis: Hiroki Dan, the Chief of the Tokyo Metropolitan Police Department's 1st Investigation Division, is an elite among elites with a brilliant career. But his hidden side is that of a serial killer who dispenses vigilante justice upon sinful villains. This is the second official spin-off of "Trace: Reminiscences of a Forensic Scientist." The devil's enviable record of vengeance, preying upon the wicked, begins again. (Source: Comic Zenon, translated)

title: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleRomaji: Isekai Nidome no Ossan, Dou Kangaete mo Koukousei Yuusha yori Tsuyoi
titleEnglish: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleNative: 異世界二度目のおっさん、どう考えても高校生勇者より強い
synonyms: The Old Man in His Second Time in Another World Is Somehow Stronger than the High School Hero
synopsis: Riku Takayanagi is a boring 32-year-old businessman with nothing special about him. Or so it seems. In truth, he once saved another world as a hero. Now he’s back in Japan, living a normal life… until one day, he’s dragged into the mess with three high school students and summoned again—this time to a different world?! Suddenly thrust into the unknown, Riku steadies the panicked teen heroes, encourages them, and teaches them how to survive. The long-awaited opening to a second-chance another-world adventure—starring a caring, absurdly overpowered old man hero! (Source: Alpha Manga)

titleNative: 哲也～雀聖と呼ばれた男～
synonyms: てつや じゃんせいとよばれたおとこ
哲也 雀聖と呼ばれた男
哲也 ―雀聖と呼ばれた男―
synopsis: In the year 1947, the people of Shinjuku are down on their luck. With little money to buy food or necessities, some resort to gambling in order to survive. Traveling Tetsuya chooses to spend his time at Mahjong parlors where he is wiping the floor clean with his adversaries. However, Tetsuya meets the intensely-skilled Boushu-san, this is when he realizes that his skills are still lacking. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Nani mo Shiranai kedo, Kimi ga Suki.
titleRomaji: Nani mo Shiranai kedo, Kimi ga Suki.
titleNative: 何も知らないけど、キミが好き。
synonyms: Is It Impossible to Love and Wise.
synopsis: "I have someone I like. Far away. He is very far away." It's important for otaku to maintain that proper distance with their "favorite," so they don't fall too madly in love with their idol. Airi is an otaku who rejects real people and is only interested in two-dimensional characters. In the "2.5 dimension," the space between fiction and reality, she encounters the real-life protagonist. A love story that can't stay in the safe zone. (Source: Young Jump, translated)

title: The Laid-Off Cheat-Granting Mage Enjoys a Second Lease on Life
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
titleEnglish: The Laid-Off Cheat-Granting Mage Enjoys a Second Lease on Life
titleNative: 追放されたチート付与魔術師は気ままなセカンドライフを謳歌する。　～俺は武器だけじゃなく、あらゆるものに『強化ポイント』を付与できるし、俺の意思でいつでも効果を解除できるけど、残った人たち大丈夫？～
synonyms: The Exiled Cheating Magician Enjoys an Unrestrained Second Life.: I Can Give "Strengthening Points" Not Only to Weapons, But Also to Everything, and I Can Unlock the Effect at Any Time of My Will, But are the Rest Okay?
synopsis: Rein the Enchanter is a support mage with the ability to enhance weapons and armor. But when he gets fired from his guild for the simple reason that he's already enchanted everything they own, he decides to take the power back into his own hands—literally! Rein recalls every enchantment he ever put on his guildmates' gear, retrieving the bonus points for himself. But does he really not have anything better to enchant with them than some Plain Clothes and a Copper Sword…? Come along on a cheat-tier journey from the most common of common origins! (Source: K MANGA)
chapterSourceTitle: Tsuihou Sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life o Ouka Suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" o Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka o Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?

title: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleRomaji: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleNative: 怪異部～M県Y市の怪現象について～
synopsis: When transfer student Sakura Sakuraba arrives in Yuuyamichou, she discovers a place steeped in bizarre, ancient customs. The children there all have strange names and are bound by a curse that prevents them from leaving the city until they graduate high school. Caught in an escalating nightmare, Sakura must navigate curses, summonings, and betrayals. To break the curse and free the children, Sakura teams up with Uzu Andou, the mysterious president of the Paranormal Club. Their strange "club activities" are about to begin! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Tanaka ke, Tensei Suru.
titleNative: 田中家、転生する。
synopsis: An ordinary family that loves cats. One day, the whole Tanaka family died during a major earthquake. When they woke up, they were reincarnated as the Stuart family, a noble family from another world. Though everyone is dressed in the Western style, they have memories of their previous Japanese lives. Even though they’re confused, they’ve gotten used to living in another world.
